title: lobelia × speciosa
intro: Lobelia × speciosa, also known as Lobelia speciosa, is an ornamental flowering plant that is a hybrid of the Lobelia erinus and Lobelia siphilitica. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant is rich in vitamins A and C, as well as other essential nutrients, offering several health benefits, including improved immune function and antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Lobelia × speciosa is often used as a tincture, tea, or infusion, and is also added to creams and ointments to take advantage of its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
